env.name: SVIX_API_KEY
env.note: Create at https://dashboard.svix.com (or run a Svix sandbox)

notes: The `svix` npm package is already a baseline dependency (used to verify the Clerk webhook), so no install is needed.
Add SVIX_API_KEY to workers/env.d.ts so typecheck passes.
Outbound webhooks are gated on the plan's `webhooks` flag (free = off).
